rdf:Description.dc:description: Bearing-capacity degradation under scour for the T4 (dense saturated) and T5 (loose saturated) series. Panel (a) absolute qu vs S/D; panel (b) qu/qu_intact vs S/D with the 50-70% nonlinear-onset band shaded. Uses corrected phi' values (T4 = 39.3 deg, T5 = 37.3 deg) — withdraws the R0 figures that used the mislabelled 37.5/35.5 values.
